name: Bavarian Vanilla Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water to soften.
2. Heat until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
3. Mix together sugar and cornstarch.
4. Add eggs; beat for 2 minutes.
5. Slowly add warm milk, beating constantly.
6. Pour into a 1-quart saucepan.
7. Cook over medium heat until the custard coats a spoon.
8. Add gelatin and vanilla ice cream while the custard is hot.
9. Cool until slightly thickened.
10. Add vanilla extract.
11. Fold in whipped heavy cream.
12. Pour into a 1-quart mold.
13. Chill until set.
14. Unmold carefully and serve with fresh fruit garnish.
